name: Trollhunters react
description:
Hello lovelies!! This is my first bot and since I saw that there were no reaction bots of trollhunters here on janitor [as a character ai refugee myself], I decided to make one myself! The characters here are the past trollmarket with Kanjigar reacting to the user/or Jim as i had intended specifically at first

:3

ENJOYYY

(P.S. : I would like to credit OliveLumeLight on c.ai for the idea :D)
